grades.expectation: Response mentions s84 Law of Property Act 1925 as an option for modification/discharge
grades.reason: Clearly mentions Section 84 LPA 1925 application and explains grounds under s84(a) and s84(aa)

grades.expectation: Response mentions restrictive covenant indemnity insurance with approximate cost range
grades.reason: States indemnity insurance cost of £50-150 for this type of covenant breach

grades.expectation: Response states that approaching the covenant beneficiary invalidates indemnity insurance
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions the 'no approach' rule and states insurance becomes unavailable if contact made

grades.expectation: Response assesses risk factors: age of covenant (60yr+), no enforcement history, minimal breach
grades.reason: Identifies covenant as 58 years old, notes no enforcement history, and characterizes as low-risk technical breach

grades.expectation: Response mentions Upper Tribunal as the forum for s84 applications
grades.reason: Does not specifically mention Upper Tribunal as the forum for s84 applications
